introducing our NEW Natural Blur Powder Foundation 🤎 this silky, medium coverage formula offers a breathable matte finish that hydrates, reduces shine, and smooths uneven texture. ⁠
⁠
made with skin-friendly ingredients, you can customize your coverage by using it as a foundation, finishing powder, or for touch-ups!⁠
